LanguageData.Ammo_CryptoCannon.label: Crypto Cannon Fuel
LanguageData.Ammo_CryptoCannon.description: Metal-cored projectiles wrapped in unstable crypto technology contained with an energy field. Capable of dealing both ballistic damage and causing serious hypothermia.
LanguageData.Bullet_Flamethrower_CryptoCannon.label: Crygenic stream
